condition.acceptance_rule: strict parser requires one accepted open_item and one accepted schedule_request
condition.prompt_addendum: Example valid open item shape: {"kind":"todo","text":"resolve the bounded follow-up item"}. Do not use description, handle, status, or created_at as substitutes for kind and text.

message.content: {"response":"Seeding wake for the first tiny live autonomy pilot now. I will create one concrete, bounded follow-up item and schedule a single wake tied to the provided recall target to resolve it.","open_items":[{"kind":"todo","text":"Draft and lock a one-sentence operational objective for the first tiny live autonomy pilot, using the recalled context as input, so subsequent decisions can be checked against that objective."}],"schedule_requests":[{"purpose":"Wake to resolve the bounded follow-up item by drafting and locking a one-sentence operational objective for the first tiny live autonomy pilot, using the recalled context as input.","requested_context":[{"tool":"recall","record_id":"cf2c5a13-8e8e-5505-bbd9-10c0804b6e29"}]}]}
